query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as columns
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME IN ('contracts','tasks','leads','pipeline_stages','studio_bookings','whatsapp_chats','whatsapp_messages')
GROUP BY TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3txBsc7RzZ6puht.faa1fd724e39 --database Cy2Gc9yd7vWL7aTK7BRymU --execute
